scholarships.name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be an Indian citizen.[span_0](start_span)[span_0](end_span)
Must be studying in recognized schools or colleges in India.[span_1](start_span)[span_1](end_span)
Family income limit depends on the specific scholarship scheme.[span_2](start_span)[span_2](end_span)
Student must satisfy academic performance requirements.[span_3](start_span)[span_3](end_span)
Aadhaar number and bank account are usually required.[span_4](start_span)[span_4](end_span)

scholarships.name: INSPIRE Scholarship
eligibility_criteria: Student must be among the top 1% performers in Class 12 board examinations.[span_5](start_span)[span_5](end_span)
Must pursue BSc, BS, or Integrated MSc/MS in natural sciences.[span_6](start_span)[span_6](end_span)
Course must be taken in a recognized university or institute in India.[span_7](start_span)[span_7](end_span)
Age generally between 17-22 years.[span_8](start_span)[span_8](end_span)

scholarships.name: Post-Matric SC/ST Scholarship
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must belong to SC or ST category.[span_9](start_span)[span_9](end_span)
Must be studying in post-matric courses (Class 11 and above).[span_10](start_span)[span_10](end_span)
Family income should generally be below 2.5 lakh per year (may vary slightly by state).[span_11](start_span)[span_11](end_span)
Student must be enrolled in a recognized institution.[span_12](start_span)[span_12](end_span)

scholarships.name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a female student.[span_13](start_span)[span_13](end_span)
Must be admitted to AICTE-approved technical institutions.[span_14](start_span)[span_14](end_span)
Course must be degree or diploma in technical education.[span_15](start_span)[span_15](end_span)
Family income should not exceed 8 lakh per year.[span_16](start_span)[span_16](end_span)
Maximum two girls per family can apply.[span_17](start_span)[span_17](end_span)

scholarships.name: Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana (KVPY)
eligibility_criteria: Student must have strong interest in science research.[span_18](start_span)[span_18](end_span)
Must be studying in Class 11, 12, or undergraduate science courses.[span_19](start_span)[span_19](end_span)
Must qualify the KVPY aptitude test and interview.[span_20](start_span)[span_20](end_span)
Must maintain required minimum marks in science subjects.[span_21](start_span)[span_21](end_span)

scholarships.name: Swami Vivekananda Scholarship
eligibility_criteria: Student must be a resident of West Bengal.[span_22](start_span)[span_22](end_span)
Must have minimum required marks in previous examination (usually around 60%).[span_23](start_span)[span_23](end_span)
Family income should be below 2.5 lakh per year.[span_24](start_span)[span_24](end_span)
Must be studying in recognized institutions.[span_25](start_span)[span_25](end_span)

scholarships.name: Tata Trusts Scholarships
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be an Indian student.[span_26](start_span)[span_26](end_span)
Must show financial need.[span_27](start_span)[span_27](end_span)
Must have good academic performance.[span_28](start_span)[span_28](end_span)
Admission must be in recognized institutions in India or abroad.[span_29](start_span)[span_29](end_span)

scholarships.name: Reliance Foundation Scholarship
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be an Indian citizen.[span_30](start_span)[span_30](end_span)
Must be enrolled in undergraduate degree programs.[span_31](start_span)[span_31](end_span)
Must demonstrate merit and leadership potential.[span_32](start_span)[span_32](end_span)
Family income limit generally around 15 lakh per year.[span_33](start_span)[span_33](end_span)

scholarships.name: Sitaram Jindal Foundation Scholarship
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be an Indian student.[span_34](start_span)[span_34](end_span)
Must belong to economically weaker background.[span_35](start_span)[span_35](end_span)
Must have minimum required academic marks depending on education level.[span_36](start_span)[span_36](end_span)
Scholarship available for school, college, and professional courses.[span_37](start_span)[span_37](end_span)

scholarships.name: HDFC Educational Crisis Scholarship
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be an Indian student studying in school or college.[span_38](start_span)[span_38](end_span)
Must face sudden financial crisis such as: Loss of parent/guardian, Serious illness, or Natural disaster.[span_39](start_span)[span_39](end_span)
Must show proof of financial hardship.[span_40](start_span)[span_40](end_span)
